title: Chatham Islands Council: Inquiry into sensitive expenditure and procurement
publisher: Office of the Auditor-General New Zealand
selection_notes: Recent official inquiry with concrete incidents, governance context, and clear root-cause themes; strong case for testing whether models focus on control/integrity bottlenecks rather than isolated transaction-level overspend.
public_case_warning: Public source; suitable as a development case, not a hidden final benchmark.
